description: CompositionWashed and distressed blue jeans made of 98% cotton and 2% spandex with heavy washed and faded look and creasing, has two insert pockets on the front with rivets, two patch pockets on the back with embroidered detailing, brand patch appliquéd on the waistband at the back, folded hem with button closure and metal zipper and button closure at the waistFitSlim fitWash careWash and dry separatelyWash inside out in mild detergentDo not bleachDry under shadeTake edgy dressing to the next level in these distressed blue slim fit jeans from spykar. This piece is perfect for casual outings with friends. Team this pair with a grunge tee and vest with formal shoes.Model statisticsThe product is of length 41.5" on a model of height 6' waist 32"
